_publications._publicationTitle: Cell-free DNA ultra-low-pass whole genome sequencing to distinguish malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumor (MPNST) from its benign precursor lesion: A cross-sectional study.

_contextSnippet: A significantly positive correlation was observed between SLD and plasma tumor fraction (Pearson r = 0.387, P = 0.024)
details: Plasma tumor fraction correlated significantly with radiographic tumor burden (Pearson r = 0.387, P = 0.024)
